Sports fans and the rest of the world has reacted with dismay and disgust after an Olympic boxing match was quickly forfeited by a female competitor who was being forced to fight a man.

The IOC has legitimized male violence against women as entertainment.Get men out of women's sports.#IStandWithAngelaCariniwho should never have been made to enter a boxing ring with Imane Khelif.#SaveWomensSports@Olympics@iocmedia@Marqpic.twitter.com/3PLxDmf4e0

Italian female boxer Angela Carini was pitted angainst Algeria’s Imane Khelif, a biological male.

The fight ended after only 46 seconds as Carini, in fear for her life, threw in the towel following two head blows from the clearly stronger and bigger Khelef.

After 46 seconds and a few hits to the face by a male, Carini forfeited the fight.Call me crazy, but It's almost as if women don't want to be punched in the face by a male as the world watches and applauds.This is glorified male violence against women.pic.twitter.com/RYU7aTbn0I

This happens the SAME DAY the Biden-Harris administration's Title IX rewrite goes into effect in the USTHIS is exactly what it allows for & celebrates. Don't be surprised or ask "how did we get here?" when this continues to happen at an exponential ratepic.twitter.com/YnlMY0TDCA

The world’s preeminent sporting competition literally just did a scene from South Park.

The Olympics did the South Park memepic.twitter.com/vddHXQUuHW

NEW: South Park becomes reality after biological male boxer Imane Khelif forces Italian female Angela Carini to quit in 46 seconds at the Olympics.Khelif is a biological man who failed gender eligibility tests at the 2023 World Championships.Carini shouted “this is unjust” as…pic.twitter.com/nQeMqA4Cve

Understandably emotionally overcome, Carini refused to shake her opponent’s hand as HE attempted to console her after beating the shit out of her.

Female boxer Angela Carini breaks down in tears as she falls to her knees in despair after being beaten by a biological MALE boxer during a women’s boxing match at the Paris Olympics.pic.twitter.com/OqOrrEOh8m

Carini later explained that she was competing to honour her late father, and mentor, making the outcome even more disgusting.

“I wanted this victory at all costs. Just for my father.”Italian boxer Angela Carini emotionally discusses winning for her late father after securing a spot at the Paris Olympics.She just forfeited her match against Imane Khelif, who is male.pic.twitter.com/zypHELjldX

The backlash was immediate.

This is sickening. This is a travesty.Doesn’t matter what you believe. This is wrong and dangerous.https://t.co/mddORfaK2D

Watch this (whole thread), then explain why you’re OK with a man beating a woman in public for your entertainment. This isn’t sport. From the bullying cheat in red all the way up to the organisers who allowed this to happen, this is men revelling in their power over women.https://t.co/u32FcDTy9p

I don’t want to hear a fucking word about “misogyny” from people who support this ever again. You have no ground to stand on.https://t.co/hrdiGMdZpD

This is unjust and utterly obscene. I admire and respect the female boxer Angela Carini, who refused to continue to fight this man.  I feel nothing but contempt for everyone, every organisation, and every activist who has enabled this madness. This is not the right side of…https://t.co/2f2K0cmRDo

He enjoyed that. Sadistic.https://t.co/zwjifnSatY

A young female boxer has just had everything she’s worked and trained for snatched away because you allowed a male to get in the ring with her. You’re a disgrace, your ‘safeguarding’ is a joke and#Paris24will be forever tarnished by the brutal injustice done to Carini.https://t.co/JMKzVljpyr

Olympics-sanctioned abuse against a woman. How is this real life?pic.twitter.com/xhdqD6GeYt

Could any picture sum up our new men’s rights movement better? The smirk of a male who’s knows he’s protected by a misogynist sporting establishment enjoying the distress of a woman he’s just punched in the head, and whose life’s ambition he’s just shattered.#Paris2024pic.twitter.com/Q5SbKiksXQ

This isn’t sport. This is ABUSE. The IOC’s inexcusable decision to let a man beat on a woman will go down in history as the greatest injustice in sport.#IStandWithAngelaCarini#Olympicspic.twitter.com/eQGwdUxCDn

This is the face of a woman forced into fighting a male by#olympicgamesrules that harm women. Shame on the International Olympic Federation@iocmediaThe darkest day for women’s sport. IOC sanctioned male violence against women. Angela Carini has been cheated out of her Olympic…pic.twitter.com/VcQV8XN8Qz

This is what the world has come to.

Are you still watching the Paris Olympics after they mocked Christianity and allowed a biological male to beat up a woman?pic.twitter.com/ZXtP4UjhMJ

In response, XX-XY Athletics, the athletic clothing brand that supports protection of women’s sports, has launched a fund to support female athletes speaking out against the inclusion of biological males in their competitions, and to alleviate the problem of “monetary cancellation” for doing so.

Today, a man stole a dream from Angela Carini.That’s why, today, we’re launching the XX-XY Athletics Fund @https://t.co/Fy1YIrD8GhWhen women stand down & refuse to compete against males, we’ll be there to provide financial help.#SaveWomensSportspic.twitter.com/Q9mA5GcXJ6

Your support is crucial in helping us defeat mass censorship. Please consider donating viaLocalsor check out our uniquemerch. Follow us on X@ModernityNews.

This is the fault of the conservative Christian male. Your childish fantasies of female purity and innocence have come to roost. You gave women the vote without holding them to the same standards of accountability as men. Now, we have a society in collapse.

Ho hum! Yawn!This is the world you morons chose!Now you’re WHINING!?Go lick a Kosher bottom and tell your “gods”how much you love them!

She should have have brought a weapon, or at least kicked him in the nuts.

Real women athletes all need to refuse to compete against biological men. Just say no.

DEI is doing exactly what the Soviets designed it to do, when they first created and implemented it back in the USSR.

It’s not misogyny when so many feminists support it.

I’m forced to admit there is something in what you write. But who was behind the militant feminist movement? – all the original radical feminists were Jewish. It’s up to Women to bring common sense back to the middle.

Failing as a Man And Thinking That MAYBE Your a Woman???-Pure Idiocy!-And According To Every Mental Health Practitioner?-This is a Mental Illness!!-If You Hate Your Life So Much And Make People Around You Cringe?-Then End It!-Take Medication and Get Your Brain Operated On Before ANY Thing Else!!

Just when you thought they clean up ‘the trash’ off the Paris Streets.  They allow another kind of trash into the Olympics.

Women voted for this lol. According to demonkkkRATS a man is a better woman than a woman. They also encourage child abuse, child mutilation and outright murdering those burdens.

title: The Olympics Just Did The South Park Man vs Woman Boxing Match Meme For Real - modernity
author: Steve Watson
description: Guess who won in under a minute?
